title: The Birthday Surprise
teaching_point: You CAN have birthday cake. You just need the right insulin timing. T1D doesn't steal your birthday.

scenes.subtitle_text: It's my birthday! Can I have cake?
scenes.voice_text: It's my birthday! Can I have cake?

scenes.subtitle_text: Of COURSE you can have cake. Let me show you what happens.
scenes.voice_text: Of COURSE you can have cake. Let me show you what happens.

scenes.visual_note: Birthday cake bolus — insulin handles the cake with correct timing
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin handles the cake. We just need to time it right.
scenes.voice_text: See? Your insulin handles the cake. We just need to time it right.

scenes.subtitle_text: So T1D doesn't take my birthday?
scenes.voice_text: So T1D doesn't take my birthday?

scenes.visual_note: Both characters laughing together — warm ending
scenes.subtitle_text: Never. Now go eat your cake, Gatiepie.
scenes.voice_text: Never. Now go eat your cake, Gatiepie.
